items.title: Liverpool 'should be happy' in Conference League
items.summary: Dominik Szoboszlai said Liverpool "should be happy with the Conference League" if their disappointing form continues and added he feels "flat" after his team conceded a late equaliser in their 1-1 draw with Tottenham Hotspur.

items.title: Savy King plays in 1st game since cardiac event
items.summary: Savy King returned to action for the first time in over 10 months when she came on as a substitute during Angel City's win over Chicago Stars FC on Sunday night in Los Angeles.

items.title: 5th member of Iran women's team gives up asylum
items.summary: A fifth member of the Iranian women's soccer team who accepted a refugee visa to stay in Australia has left the country, the Australian government said on Monday local time.

items.title: Carrick: Man Utd 'definitely' can't lose Fernandes
items.summary: Michael Carrick said Manchester United "definitely" don't want to lose Bruno Fernandes in the summer despite ongoing doubt about his long-term future at Old Trafford.

items.title: As fans turn on their club, time is running out for Liverpool to save their season
items.summary: Boos greeted Liverpool at the end of a 1-1 draw to Tottenham at Anfield that signaled further decline for the reigning Premier League champions.

items.title: Sinner hails F1 star Antonelli after securing first Indian Wells title
items.summary: Jannik Sinner claimed ‌his maiden Indian Wells title, defeating ‌Daniil Medvedev 7-6 (8-6) 7-6 (7-4) in a polished ​display of hard-court excellence under the California desert sun.

items.title: Samenvatting: Ajax wervelt in eerste duel onder García langs Sparta
items.summary: Ajax heeft de eerste wedstrijd sinds het afzetten van Fred Grim als hoofdtrainer gewonnen . Zondag waren de Amsterdammers onder interim-trainer Óscar García een paar maatjes te groot voor Sparta Rotterdam. Steven Berghuis speelde een belangrijke rol bij de thuisploeg.

items.title: Samenvatting: PSV wéér niet opgewassen tegen NEC, Linssen blinkt uit
items.summary: PSV heeft zaterdag andermaal verloren van NEC . De ploeg van Peter Bosz werd eerder al uitgeschakeld in de beker door de Nijmegenaren. Mede door de uitblinkende Bryan Linssen won NEC in competitieverband met 2-3.

items.title: Samenvatting: Feyenoord komt dankzij Ueda met de schrik vrij tegen Excelsior
items.summary: Feyenoord heeft zondagmiddag een overwinning geboekt op Excelsior . Na een uiterst moeizame eerste helft boog de ploeg van Robin van Persie een achterstand om. Eredivisie-topscorer Ayase Ueda had het weer eens op zijn heupen.

items.title: Laporta wint presidentsverkiezingen Barcelona met overmacht
items.summary: Joan Laporta blijft de president van Barcelona. De huidige president van de Catalaanse grootmacht versloeg zijn opponent Víctor Font met overmacht. Hij kreeg bijna zeventig procent van de stemmen. De laatste stemmen worden overigens nog geteld.

items.title: Raphinha schaart zich in fraai rijtje met Messi, Kluivert, Eto'o en Suárez
items.summary: Zondag was er weer genoeg voetbal om van te genieten, met fraaie duels in de Eredivisie en ook in het buitenland is het programma omvangrijk.

items.title: European football: Raphinha hat-trick seals Barcelona win, Lazio beat Milan
items.summary: Barça thrash Sevilla to restore four-point lead in La Liga Isaksen damages Milan’s title hopes with first-half winner Raphinha hit a hat-trick as Barcelona thrashed Sevilla 5-2 to restore their four-point lead at the top of La Liga. After Real Madrid cut the gap by beating Elche on Saturday, the Spanish champions responded by romping to a comfortable victory. Dani Olmo and João Cancelo also struck for Hansi Flick’s side, who host Newcastle in the Champions League on Wednesday. Fans streamed to the stadium to vote in the club’s presidential elections, with either Joan Laporta or Victor Font to be announced the new chief later on Sunday night. Continue reading...

items.title: Incredible DRAMA as Åberg finds the water on back-to-back holes!
items.summary: Ludvig Åberg went into the water on back-to-back holes at The Players to throw away his lead!

items.title: 'Wake up... or be happy with Conference League'
items.summary: Liverpool have been here far too often this season. Another late, late goal costing them points as they drew 1-1 with struggling Tottenham.

items.title: ‘This is something big’: Igor Tudor hails Spurs spirit to snatch draw at Liverpool
items.summary: Richarlison’s late goal earns head coach first point ‘It’s a long way to our goal but today was important’ Igor Tudor described Tottenham’s first point of his tenure as the start of “something big” after drawing at Liverpool. The Croat had overseen four straight defeats since taking over and was heading for a fifth until Richarlison’s last-minute equaliser. Dominik Szoboszlai fired Liverpool into a first-half lead from a free-kick but they were denied a victory that would move them into fourth by a visiting side who had only had 12 senior outfield players available, unable to fill their bench. Tudor handed Premier League debuts to two teenagers but his side were still able to hold the defending champions. Continue reading...

items.title: Spurs answer Tudor's call with show of fight in the face of crisis
items.summary: Spurs interim coach Igor Tudor told his players they could "cry or fight". BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty saw a display of defiance to draw at Liverpool.

items.title: Richarlison's injury-time strike earns Spurs a point at Liverpool
items.summary: Richarlison's 90th-minute equaliser earns Tottenham Hotspur a 1-1 draw at Liverpool to ease the pressure on interim coach Igor Tudor.

items.title: Have Old Firm wrestled title momentum away from Hearts?
items.summary: After wins for Celtic and Rangers and a defeat for leaders Hearts, what next in the captivating Scottish Premiership title race?

items.title: Carrick continues to make case for permanent Man Utd role
items.summary: Wayne Rooney calls on Manchester United to give Michael Carrick the manager's job after boosting their hopes of Champions League qualification.

items.title: Spurs snatch vital point with Richarlison's late leveller at Anfield
items.summary: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from the Premier League match between Liverpool and Tottenham Hotspur.

items.title: Ashley Cole lands first managerial role as head coach of Serie B side Cesena
items.summary: Former left-back signs until June with option to stay on Cole has been coach at Chelsea, Everton and Derby Ashley Cole has been appointed as the head coach of the Serie B side Cesena. It is a first management role for the former Arsenal, Chelsea and England full-back, who has been developing as a coach since retiring from playing in 2019. Cole’s positions have included working with Frank Lampard at Derby, Chelsea and Everton, with Wayne Rooney at Birmingham, and with England and the Football Association. Continue reading...

items.title: Navratilova: Sinner is the most prolific and consistent performer on tour
Chelsea’s James leads way to win League Cup final against Manchester United
items.summary: Chelsea 2-0 Man Utd (James 19, Beever-Jones 76) Blues retain Women’s League Cup with victory Death, taxes and Chelsea women winning trophies. Regardless of their form this season, regardless of an all-but relinquished Women’s Super League title, with Manchester City nine points clear at the top of the table, you can never bet against the Blues in a cup final – or Lauren James making an impact. If there was a time for Manchester United to get the better of Sonia Bompastor’s side, having twice lost to them in the FA Cup final, it was now. Marc Skinner’s side sit one point ahead of Chelsea in the league, and they have looked in better form. Continue reading...

items.title: Manchester United sink Aston Villa to tighten grip on Champions League spot
items.summary: On 71 minutes a classic Manchester United riposte, via Matheus Cunha, to Ross Barkley’s equaliser moments before. From around halfway, the peerless Bruno Fernandes glanced up and steered the ball through an inside left channel for Cunha. United’s No 10 galloped forward and as Emiliano Martínez loomed large the Brazilian’s curled finish was a peach that kissed the far right of the net, Cunha stepping forward before the Stretford End to soak up the ecstatic adoration. Fernandes’ assist was his 100th in all competitions for United, the contest’s second, and 16th in the Premier League. The last statistic is a club record, this term’s competition high, and a latest argument for winning the player of the season awards. Continue reading...

items.title: Nijman beats Price in final to secure European Darts Trophy
items.summary: Wessel Nijman was crowned the winner of the Elten Safety Shoes European Darts Trophy with a history-making win over Gerwyn Price in Germany.

items.title: La RAAL s'offre le Cercle de Bruges et relance la lutte pour éviter les Relegation Play-Offs
items.summary: La RAAL La Louvière s'impose 1-3 au Cercle de Bruges grâce à un réalisme glacial et un grand Marco Peano.

items.title: Wie blijft in eerste klasse? De situatie is duidelijk voor OH Leuven, La Louvière, Zulte Waregem en Cercle
items.summary: La Louvière pakte een heel belangrijke zege op bezoek bij Cercle Brugge met 1-3. En zo zijn de kaarten toch op een iets andere manier geschud op speeldag 29. Wie verzekert zich volgende week van een verlengd verblijf in de Jupiler Pro League?

items.title: Carl Hoefkens komt terug op hetze met Feyenoord ... en krijgt er zes om de oren
items.summary: Het 3-3 gelijkspel tussen NAC Breda en Feyenoord is een hele week lang een hot topic gebleven bij de Nederlandse pers. Aanleiding was een uitspraak van Carl Hoefkens, die we nog kennen van bij Standard en Club Brugge onder meer en nu aan de slag is bij de club uit Breda.

items.title: Saint-Trond s'essouffle-t-il avant les Play-Offs ? Wouter Vrancken dresse un constat inquiétant
items.summary: Wouter Vrancken avait des regrets après la défaite de Saint-Trond dans le derby limbourgeois contre Genk.

items.title: De kaarten geschud? RSC Anderlecht, KAA Gent, KRC Genk en Standard weten wat te doen
items.summary: KV Mechelen heeft gewonnen van RSC Anderlecht en zo is de situatie rondom het behalen van de Champions' Play-offs heel wat duidelijker geworden. Wat staat er nog op het spel op de slotspeeldag?
